steps.title: Convert percentages to express a and b in terms of c
steps.content: Since $a$ is 2,800% of $c$: $$a = \frac{2800}{100} \cdot c = 28c$$ Since $c$ is 25% of $b$: $$c = \frac{25}{100} \cdot b = 0.25b$$ Solving for $b$: $$b = \frac{c}{0.25} = 4c$$

steps.title: Substitute into a - b = wc and solve for w
steps.content: Substitute $a = 28c$ and $b = 4c$ into $a - b = wc$: $$28c - 4c = wc$$ $$24c = wc$$ Dividing both sides by $c$ (which is positive): $$w = 24$$
